basic_info.title: Super Mario RPG: Legend of the Seven Stars
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the SNES era that successfully blends the charm of Mario with deep RPG mechanics, praised for its innovative battle system and engaging story.

alternative_names: Super Mario RPG: Legend of the Seven Stars (Remake)

play_today.details: The definitive modern version with 60fps performance, updated 3D visuals while preserving original art style, quality-of-life improvements including auto-battle and skip features.

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update ensuring rock-solid 60fps performance throughout all gameplay

play_today.details: The original classic experience. Best played on authentic hardware or high-quality emulation for the nostalgic feel.
Access to original SNES version through Nintendo's subscription service. Convenient but lacks remake improvements.

The definitive modern experience. Features a full 3D HD remake with 60 FPS, native widescreen, and a new post-game dungeon. Includes full English localization, voice acting, and quality-of-life improvements like auto-save and battle speed adjustments. Digital Foundry confirms stable performance and superior visuals over the original.

The original 1996 experience for purists seeking the authentic isometric perspective and classic soundtrack. While it lacks modern conveniences like save states or widescreen, it offers the most faithful representation of the original design. Requires an emulator or hardware to play in English outside of Japan, as the NA release was delayed and region-locked.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario RPG: Relocalized
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive retranslation patch for the SNES version that rewrites the entire script to be more faithful to the original Japanese text, restoring cut content and correcting mistranslations from the 1996 English release.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario RPG: Legend of the Seven Stars (USA) - Widescreen Patch
recommended_patches.description: Modifies the SNES ROM to render the game in widescreen aspect ratio, fixing graphical glitches and stretching issues while maintaining the original isometric perspective.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario RPG: Armageddon
recommended_patches.description: A difficulty and content enhancement patch for the SNES version that rebalances enemies, adds new post-game bosses, and includes boss rushes for a more challenging experience.

recommended_patches.name: Super Mario RPG SNES New Game Plus
recommended_patches.description: Adds a New Game Plus mode to the SNES version, allowing players to carry over late-game equipment and stats into a new playthrough.

optimal_settings: Enable Widescreen Patch support in video settings
Set Frame Skip to 0 for smooth 60 FPS gameplay
Use S-Video or 2xSAI filter for clean sprite scaling
Configure audio to 44100Hz for accurate soundtrack playback
Enable Widescreen rendering in display options
Set Resolution to 2x or 3x for sharp visuals on modern screens
Enable Save States for quick checkpointing
Map on-screen controls to match original SNES layout
Set Internal Resolution to 4x for high-definition clarity
Enable NTSC mode for correct color timing and accuracy
Disable Frame Skip to ensure perfect audio/video sync
Use 'High Quality' texture filtering for smooth scaling

play_today.details: A Virtual Console port of the North American SNES version. It offers the convenience of cloud saves and the Wii Remote pointer for menu navigation, but lacks the graphical enhancements of the Switch remake. The aspect ratio is stretched to 4:3, and it does not include the post-game content or quality-of-life updates found in the 2023 version.

description.synopsis: When the Star Rod is shattered by the villain Smithy, the seven Star Pieces scatter across the Mushroom Kingdom. Mario teams up with the mysterious Geno and the young Mallow to retrieve the pieces and restore the Star Rod before Smithy's army conquers the world. Their journey takes them through diverse landscapes, facing bizarre enemies and uncovering the true nature of their alliance.
key_features: Turn-based combat with real-time movement mechanics
Unique 'Battle Ring' system allowing character positioning
Cooperative attacks and combo moves between party members
Exploration of the Mushroom Kingdom and Star Road
Integration of Mario universe characters with original RPG mechanics
Mini-games and side quests integrated into the main narrative
Dynamic camera angles and 2.5D pre-rendered graphics
Character progression through equipment and stat growth
Remake features including 3D graphics and quality-of-life improvements
legacy_and_impact: Super Mario RPG: Legend of the Seven Stars is widely regarded as one of the greatest RPGs of all time, pioneering the fusion of platforming icons with role-playing depth. Its unique battle system and charming narrative set a high bar for future Mario RPGs, influencing the Paper Mario and Mario & Luigi series.
